wiring_gap: The cascade module exists, is well-structured, and is test-verified. But live_public_pipeline.py imports it ZERO times. _ensure_discovery_patched() has no branch on is_providerless_enabled(). _ASYNC_DISCOVERY_SEARCH is unconditionally set to async_search_public_web from duckduckgo_adapter at module import time. To wire providerless: _ensure_discovery_patched() must call is_providerless_enabled() and assign async_search_providerless when env=1.
source_family_analysis: When cascade is enabled and DDG fails → historical_frontier returns hits with source_family='historical'. When cascade is enabled and DDG+histo fail → wayback_cdx returns hits with source_family='archive'. Both source_family values are set in DiscoveryBatchResult but NOT propagated into public_branch_verdict. The fallback_triggered string IS propagated which indicates fallback activity but not which source_family produced hits.
